summary: A5 'Ranking por Mesa / Área' report fully validated — both backend and frontend. 7/7 pytest pass including JSON values against expected dataset (grand_total=32144, grand_bills=42, tables_with_sales=12, areas_with_sales=3, Mesa 1/Terraza top $8,208/16tix/25.5%, Salon Principal top $17,792/22tix/7 mesas/Mesa 4, Terraza $8,976, VIP $5,376/Mesa 21), auth enforcement on XLSX/PDF (401), PDF magic %PDF, XLSX magic PK with real Excel formulas (=SUM(D..D)/E/F for TOP MESAS totals, =IF(D>0,F/D,0) ticket prom, =IF(F>0,F{row}/F{total},0) % per row, and =SUM(B..B)/C/D for área block). Frontend desktop 1920x1080 verified: sidebar entry 'Ranking por Mesa / Área' appears exactly at END of 'Ventas y Caja' (order confirmed: hourly-sales → open-checks → sales-comparative → product-mix-by-employee → sales-by-weekday → sales-by-table), all 4 KPI testids + top-tables-table + sbt-grand-total + sbt-by-area + 12 sbt-row-* + 3 sbt-area-row-* + download buttons render, KPI values match expected exactly, área badges colored, data-testid='sales-by-table-report' appears exactly 1 time. Downloads via UI trigger blob correctly (PDF 18040B, XLSX 6691B). Mobile 390x844: KPI grid shows 2 cols (177px 177px), optional columns hidden (Área, Comensales, Ticket Prom as display:none at row 0). Regression (iter 157 green): A4/A7/A8/B5/hourly JSON endpoints still respond 200 with auth.

ui_bugs.issue: % sum cell shows 'RD$ 0.00100.0%'. The hack `formatMoney(0).replace('$0.00', '')` fails because formatMoney returns 'RD$ 0.00' (with space) not 'RD$0.00', so replace('$0.00','') leaves 'RD$ 0.' style residue glued to the percent. Cosmetic only (all other data correct).

action_items: (LOW, cosmetic) Fix grand-total % cell in SalesByTableReport.jsx line ~163-165: replace `{formatMoney(0).replace('$0.00', '')}{pctSum.toFixed(1)}%` with simply `{pctSum.toFixed(1)}%` — the formatMoney(0) prefix serves no purpose and leaks 'RD$ 0.00' into the cell. All numeric data is correct; only display artifact.
(OPTIONAL) Consider adding data-testid='theme-toggle' to the theme switch button so automated dark/light mode regression can be done programmatically (could not locate toggle by common selectors).
critical_code_review_comments: XLSX generator correctly uses real Excel formulas (=SUM / =IF) not hardcoded numbers — verified via openpyxl formula introspection. Good implementation pattern consistent with A4/A7.
Backend JOIN logic (bills.table_number → tables.number → areas.name) correctly resolves 12/22 mesas with area attribution matching ground truth.

SalesByTableReport.jsx total row has cosmetic bug: `formatMoney(0).replace('$0.00', '')` is a code smell — the replace string doesn't match the actual formatMoney output ('RD$ 0.00' has a space). Either remove the prefix entirely or use a clean empty string.
Responsive hidden classes (hidden sm:table-cell / hidden md:table-cell) properly applied across both tables — verified at 390px width that Área, Comensales, Ticket Prom columns computed display:none.
Sidebar ordering confirmed correct: 'Ranking por Mesa / Área' appears at END of 'Ventas y Caja' after 'Ventas por Día de la Semana'.
Auth Bearer properly enforced on XLSX and PDF endpoints (401/403 without token).
Determinístic area palette using indexOf(name) over areaNames array — colors stay consistent per area across both tables ✓
seed_data_creation: None - used existing bills in 2026-04-01..20 range
context_for_next_testing_agent: A5 Ranking por Mesa/Área fully green. JSON: /api/reports/sales-by-table?date_from&date_to&limit (default 20, 5-100). Response: {summary:{grand_total, grand_bills, tables_with_sales, areas_with_sales, top_table, top_table_total, top_area, top_area_total}, top_tables:[{table, area, bills, guests, total, avg_ticket, pct}], by_area:[{area, bills, tables_count, total, avg_ticket, top_table, pct}]}. XLSX: /api/reports/xlsx/sales-by-table/{xlsx,pdf} auth Bearer required. Frontend: default date range is 'Hoy' which often has no data — tester must click 'Este Mes' preset. Sidebar order at end of Ventas y Caja: hourly-sales → open-checks → sales-comparative → product-mix-by-employee → sales-by-weekday → sales-by-table. On mobile, Ventas y Caja group is collapsed by default — click text='Ventas y Caja' to expand. Theme toggle lacks a data-testid — dark mode programmatic verification skipped; prior iters 149-156 confirmed theme-aware rendering.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical bugs. Only a minor cosmetic residue in grand-total % cell (RD$ 0.00 prefix leak). Root cause: the replace() call uses literal '$0.00' but formatMoney returns 'RD$ 0.00' (with space), so no substring match occurs. Mitigation: drop the prefix entirely.
